Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SHYAM JAGANNATH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Margaret E. Murray of the Law Offices of Margaret E. Murray (585.5400) for defendant and responding party; Herbert W. Yanowitz (362.1365) for plaintiff and moving party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: granted in light of the stipulated revised briefing schedule on defendant City Club's summary judgment motion (presently set for July 8, 2011).
Defendant City Club, LLC will file an amended motion for summary judgment by June 8, 2011 (to be set for hearing on July 22, 2011). Opposition to be filed by July 8, 2011, and reply by July 15, 2011. Ms. Murray to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
